headline: AutoZone (NYSE:AZO) Reports Sales Below Analyst Estimates In Q2 CY2026 Earnings
summary: Auto parts and accessories retailer AutoZone (NYSE:AZO) missed Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q2 CY2026, but sales rose 8.4% year on year to $4.84 billion. Its GAAP profit of $38.07 per share was 5.3% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: AutoZone (NYSE:AZO) Reports Sales Below Analyst Estimates In Q2 CY2026 Earnings
content.summary: Auto parts and accessories retailer AutoZone (NYSE:AZO) missed Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q2 CY2026, but sales rose 8.4% year on year to $4.84 billion. Its GAAP profit of $38.07 per share was 5.3% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: AutoZone 3rd Quarter Total Company Same Store Sales Increase 3.9%; Domestic Same Store Sales Increase 4.1%; EPS of $38.07
summary: MEMPHIS, Tenn., May 26, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- AutoZone, Inc. (NYSE: AZO) today reported net sales of $4.8 billion for its third quarter (12 weeks) ended May 9, 2026, an increase of 8.4% from the third quarter of fiscal 2025 (12 weeks). headline: Why AutoZone (AZO) Stock Is Down Today
